description_long: This is a modern bungalow situated on a landscaped plot with a driveway leading from the street to the main entrance. The structure features a flat roof and a combination of white and gray exterior walls, accented by large windows that allow ample natural light. The building is accompanied by a detached garage or auxiliary structure towards the rear, connected by a paved pathway. The property is surrounded by a green lawn, and the main house is set back from the road, providing privacy and space. The design emphasizes clean lines, geometric forms, and a minimalist aesthetic typical of contemporary residential architecture.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large windows, white and gray exterior, and a detached rear structure on a landscaped lot.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the main entrance, driveway, and the prominent flat roof of the bungalow.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the side facade, large windows, and the full extent of the landscaped lot.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the detached auxiliary structure and the connecting pathway across the lawn.
description_view_3: Right-side view with a clear look at the garage/auxiliary building and the main house's side elevation.
